name: task
description: Linear task workflow with explicit checkpoints (design → build → ship), the one-verb /task:go entry, plus the /task:auto-roadmap autopilot. 8 skills (3 orchestrators + go one-verb entry + bootstrap + 2 off-cycle + validate) + 8 subagents (3 read-only build-audit lenses + 3 read-only roadmap-refine lenses + 2 shared executor runners — design half and build half, shared by auto-roadmap and go --auto, build half spawned with per-item model override from plan.md → Implement-Model).
